title: The Commercial Documents Evidence Act, 1939
full_text: The Commercial Documents Evidence Act, 1939 वाणिज्‍यिक दस्‍तावेज साक्ष्‍य अधिनियम,1939 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 193930 Act Number: 30 Enactment Date: 1939-09-26 Act Year: 1939 Short Title: The Commercial Documents Evidence Act, 1939 Hindi Title: वाणिज्‍यिक दस्‍तावेज साक्ष्‍य अधिनियम,1939 Long Title: An Act to amend the Law of Evidence with respect to certain commercial documents. Ministry: Ministry of Law and Justice Department: Legislative Department Enforcement Date: 26-09-1939 Notification: Notification No. 361-J., dated the 31st January, 1940. Schedule 1.
